title: HandToHand
description:
Press R to give items directly or hold them out for others to take.
Perfect for RP servers!
body:
No more tossing items on the ground!

With Hand to Hand you can share items directly, cleanly, and dynamically with the press of a single key.

How does it work?



Just walk up to a friend and press the give key (R):

![give](https://i.imgur.com/wFLWHru.gif)

The item in your main hand goes straight into their inventory. Hold Ctrl to give the full stack.



Feeling generous? As a fun roleplay touch, you can also signal that you want to share:
Press the give key without looking at anyone to raise your hands:

![get](https://i.imgur.com/3PHhQnx.gif)

Now, whatever's in your hand can be picked up by anyone who presses the give key on you.

Perfect for roleplay servers or just casual friendly gameplay!
